## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass.
- [ ] Docs updated.
- [ ] Public schemas updated if needed.
- [ ] CLI/API/MCP examples updated if needed.
- [ ] Output PDFs include validation where applicable.
- [ ] New dependencies reviewed for license/security.
- [ ] No secrets or proprietary endpoints included.

## Screenshots / artifacts

Attach before/after outputs for PDF-generating changes when possible.
